output: Implemented `src/shared/state/panesStore.ts` as the singleton selector-first panes store. It now mirrors the former panes surface, preserves the existing effective-height calculation and pane lock/open semantics, bootstraps runtime-backed lock policy state through an explicit owner-based idempotent bootstrap path, exposes intentional outside-bootstrap reads via `availability.bootstrapped === false` plus a deterministic unlocked default snapshot, and includes lifecycle/test reset helpers.

task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented `src/shared/state/panesStore.ts` as the selector-first singleton panes surface. The store now carries pane lock/open/layout/activeTask state, computes effective heights with the same tiered logic as the former provider, bootstraps from `usePaneLockPolicyState` via an explicit owner-based idempotent bootstrap path, exposes outside-bootstrap reads as a deterministic unlocked default snapshot with `availability.bootstrapped=false`, and includes reset/clear helpers for tests and lifecycle cleanup. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; `npx vitest run src/shared/contexts/usePaneLockPolicyState.test.ts src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` passed.
commands_run: rg -n "export function useIsMobile|export const useIsMobile|useIsTablet" src/shared -g '*.ts' -g '*.tsx'

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `src/shared/state/panesStore.ts` now provides a selector-first singleton store that preserves the former pane fields and effective-height math, wires runtime-backed lock/open behavior through `usePaneLockPolicyState` bootstrap data, exposes `availability.bootstrapped` plus deterministic default reads before bootstrap, and includes explicit clear/reset helpers for lifecycle cleanup and tests. Typecheck and the relevant panes/pane-lock-policy test modules both passed after the change.
